channel.title: PYT Radar
channel.description: Podcast & YouTube Tracking — automated episode digest. Tracking mentions of Karen Bass, Nithya Raman, and more across podcasts and YouTube.

item.title: Fly on the Wall: David Spade blames Karen Bass for Hollywood decline
item.description:
Fly on the Wall with Dana Carvey and David Spade
"Adam Friedland Joins the Old Boys Club" — Published March 19, 2026

Match: Karen Bass (mentioned, not a guest)

Sentiment: Negative

David Spade directly named Mayor Karen Bass and Governor Newsom as bearing responsibility for the decline of Hollywood production in LA, citing the bankruptcy of CBS Radford Studio Center. Dana Carvey called the Hollywood studio system dying and argued for tax breaks and union negotiations. The segment generated widespread media coverage.

Key moment at 20:54: "I was on the lot at CBS Radford when we were doing Just Shoot Me... just filed for bankruptcy. The lot, terrifying in L.A. Thanks, Karen Bass. Thanks, Gavin." — David Spade

Watch Episode | Summary | Full Transcript
